# Star Brooch

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Dúnedain_** or **_Noldor_** hero. Limit 1 per hero.
While you are engaged with an enemy, attached hero gets +1 WP and cannot have its WP reduced.

---

> *...each cloak was pinned upon the left shoulder by a brooch of silver shaped like a rayed star.*
> — The Return of the King

**Pack:** [[The Lost Realm]] #13
